sizing_rule.note: Risk 3% of account equity per trade. Increase unit exposure when account equity grows 1.2x or more. Maximum position size capped at 12% of equity. Formula: (Account Equity × 3%) / (Entry Price - Stop Loss Distance)

source_rule_text: A trader should adjust position size based on a percentage of account equity risk rather than fixed unit sizing, because fixed units prevent meaningful leverage growth in small accounts and ignore the relationship between account size and exposure.
